seo.title: Learning Hub | Joshua Tree Health
seo.description: Plain-language resources on teen mental health, PHP, IOP, insurance, admissions, and crisis support from Joshua Tree Health.

hero.title: Start with what you need to know.
hero.sub: Program details, insurance help, admissions steps, and crisis resources in plain language.

resources.title: The questions families bring first.
resources.intro: Choose the question in front of you. Each page gives a direct answer and a clear next step.

items.title: What we treat
items.body: Observable signs of anxiety, depression, ADHD, trauma, school avoidance, and other concerns families bring us.

items.title: Insurance, explained
items.body: What in-network means, how PHP and IOP are billed, and the exact questions to ask your insurer before care begins.

items.title: Crisis resources
items.body: If you or your teen is in crisis, here are the numbers to call or text right now, and what to do next.

items.title: How admissions works
items.body: What happens when you reach out, what the first call is like, and what to have ready. No commitment, no pressure.

closing.title: Would it help to just talk it through?
closing.body: You don't have to read your way to an answer. One call is enough to find out whether Joshua Tree is the right fit for your teen.
